remarks: Welcome to your next obsession. 10 Ludlow Manor, a tastefully renovated gem nestled in the heart of East Norwalk's sought-after beachside community. Beautifully maintained 3-bedroom, 2.5-bath home blends timeless charm with modern comforts, offering exceptional convenience & style in one of Fairfield County's most desirable locations. Step inside to discover sun-filled living spaces adorned w/ gleaming hardwood floors throughout. The thoughtfully designed layout includes a spacious living room, a dining area perfect for entertaining, & a bright, updated kitchen that seamlessly connects the living spaces. Central air ensures year-round comfort, while quality finishes & attention to detail elevate every room. Upstairs, the well-appointed primary bedroom suite is your private retreat, featuring a large walk-in closet & a stylish en-suite bath. Two additional bedrooms provide flexibility for family, guests, or a home office. The partially finished basement adds extra space ideal for a playroom, media room, or fitness area. Outside, the lush, professionally landscaped yard creates a serene backdrop for outdoor living, & the two-car detached garage offers ample storage & convenience. Whether you're relaxing in the garden or hosting gatherings, this home offers the perfect setting. Ideally situated from the SoNo Collection Mall, downtown South Norwalk's trendy restaurants, beaches, Metro-North, I-95, Merritt Parkway, and Route 1-making your commute or weekend getaway effortless.
